entry.title: Witchspring R v0.3.7
entry.content: Fixed the password prompt on the client - Thank you to Ishmael for the report and DodoBirb for the quick diagnosis!

entry.title: Minecraft Fabric v1.1.2
entry.content:
# Minecraft Fabric (1.1.2)
Was planning on having this out sooner, but held off due to wanting to get some bigger stuff here. Decided that it would be best to release the bugfix now and do the bigger stuff a little later.
Mod Link: https://modrinth.com/mod/archipelago-mod AP World Link: https://github.com/Deadlydiamond98/MinecraftFabricAPWorld/releases Wiki: https://modded.wiki/w/Fabric_Archipelago_Mod
Changelog:
Minecraft
- Fixed a logic where Stone Tools were required for anything that requires smelting to be in logic - Fixed Wither Summoning Being off-screen in the item tracker - Changed the Chance for Wither Skeletons to drop skulls when the option is enabled from 25% to 50% - Hired Help now requires Shears - Piglin Heads now require Nether Access - Updated Logic for suspicious sand and gravel to account for Cobwebs - Sculk Items are now under exploration - Dry Sponge now requires Smelting - Sniffer Egg is now considered a Hard Item - Black Dye now either requires Swimming or Wither Summoning - Updated Logic For Smooth Stone and Smooth Deepslate - Fixed Clay ball requiring Nether Access (No idea how this happened) - Chests, Bottles, Brushes, Buckets, Fishing Rods, Flint & Steel / Igniters, Minecarts, Shields, & Shears now lock things in their respective Common tags
Create
- fixed logic error with Raw Zinc where it also required Compacting to be considered in logic - fixed logic error where Copper Diving Helmets were considered in logic before getting proper armor tier.
Iron Chests: Restocked
- Fixed Chest Upgrades being locked behind Chests & Barrels (as they don’t require chests nor allow for obtaining chests)

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.0r2r2r2
entry.content: - Fixed items in Mr Qi's shop with randomized price but not currency, accidentally costing twice as much as they should - Fixed a bug where using parrot express then going to the same island map could get the player stuck in cutscene state - Fixed Legend of the Winter Star not sending when christmas is on the wrong date - Changed ghost cows so that petting them increases their despawn chance for the day

entry.title: Hatsune Miku Project Diva Mega Mix+ v1.5.1b0
entry.content:
# Changelog:
# World - Added two songs to the item pool - Added `Grasssanity` item group - Changed defaults of `Duplicate Songs` and `Traps` to 50% - Improvements to the JSON generator and mod string handling - Switched to rule builder
# Mod - Switched to imgui docking so the tabs can be used as windows - Opt-in from `Advanced > Styling`. Make sure to save your settings! - General system stability improvements to enhance the user's experience

entry.title: Hades v0.16.1
entry.content:
Various balancing fixes. Mirror upgrades (items and locations) should be scattered more uniformly through the run. Changing the logic for "defeating a boss", so it checks that we are instead able to get to the next region, making spheres more balanced.
Done with @ColgateSupreme.

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda: A Link to the Past v1.2.2r2
entry.content: Fixed a bug where the client would crash when receiving an item from a player with an ID above 255.

entry.title: Oblivion Remastered v0.5.1
entry.content:
## How to use
For Archipelago instructions, see https://archipelago.gg/tutorial/
1) Generate a new Archipelago multiworld. 2) Launch the Oblivion Remastered Client from the ArchipelagoLauncher.exe. 3) Connect to your server. 4) Once connected, you can launch Oblivion Remastered through your mod manager and start playing.
## v0.5.0 New Features:
- Kill Tracking - Nirnroot Locations - Exploration Sidequests - Wealth Sidequests - Traps - Deathlink - Automated Boss Chest & Nirnroot Tracking - Treasure Hunter Goal - Nirnsanity Goal
## v0.5.1 Update:
- Added doomstone checks option - Nirnroot region batching for non-nirnsanity goal - Expanded gold locations for treasure hunter goal - Deathlink tweaks

entry.title: YARG v0.0.22
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
Changes: - Update YARN Request Pack 3
## What's Changed * Update song list to reflect changes to YARN Request Pack 3 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/49
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.21...0.0.22

entry.title: Links Awakening DX Beta v13.4.3
entry.content: Reverts some stuff in text formatting

entry.title: Donkey Kong Country 2 v3.1.4
entry.content: small code updates, some logic fixes, klobber karnage sucks ## Info * [Info](https://thelx5.github.io/dkc2/index.html) * [Trivia (REQUIRED TO PLAY)](https://github.com/TheLX5/DKC2-Trivia/releases/latest) ## Changes * Updated Lost World Rock item placement code so it sucks less * Changed some rules to use macros, macros can be used with UT's `/explain` * Trivia error message updated to tell the player they're missing the trivia apworld more clearly * Updated loose logic * Everything about Klobber Karnage * KONG and Clear in Krockhead Klamber no longer require Kannons * Banana Coin 1 & 2 in Web Woods can require Cartwheel to reach * Green Balloon 1 in Web Woods uses the expert logic * Updated expert logic * Mainbrace Mayhem Bonus 1 & Banana Bunch 1 no longer requires Hover or Cartwheel when using Diddy * Banana Coin 1 & 2 in Web Woods uses loose logic

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.13
entry.content:
## Mod - Fixed the Junimo Kart leaderboards potentially crashing when NPCs don't exist - Implemented Reverse Trap
## Apworld - Fixed name of `Meet Caroline` location. The typo made it not generate this location at all - Fixed the biggest bug ever™. All other_requirements on sources were getting lost in DR - Added missing NPC existence rules to various quests and cutscenes - Added more sanitization to fish DR, notably night market fish in winter, island fish in summer, etc. - Fixed Marlon and Gunther rules when the Jasper mod is active and they turn real - Remove the robin money-making rule when using unshuffled tools because it often turned recursive - Slight optimization of season rules - Always randomize entrances for obelisks and warp totems, instead of relying on endgame locations being enabled, since the items are always in the pool - Make sure crab pot fish that turn into fishing rod fish, roll a low difficulty if difficulties aren't DRed - Added Reverse Trap

entry.title: pokemon_stadium v0.6.2
entry.content:
Bugfix for Prime Cup rental list. Pika Cup rental list in `constants` had Pokémon included that should not have been, which was causing the patcher to overwrite some of the Prime Cup list and break it.
Fixed the gender symbol bug for the Nidorans.

entry.title: The Binding of Isaac Repentance v0.4.1
entry.content: Fuzzer, manifest, determinism and UT compatibility fixes

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16909823
entry.content:
**To see notes and what's new for alpha03, see [alpha03a](https://github.com/JKLeckr/Archipelago-cuphead/releases/tag/alpha03a)**
### Revision
This revision fixed the top grade rule for Rugged Ridge when DLC is disabled.

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.10.11
entry.content:
I genuinely can't remember what I changed with this update. I've been busy, and also decided to enable hard mode in life, whoops. It probably works, but I'll mark as pre-release just to be sure. For some reason the tracker doesn't track settlements in spheres mode, I dunno why.
This should at least fix some inconsistencies with spheres mode using the distance of the settlements rather than the distance of the faction's capital.
New [submods](https://github.com/jordansds/TWW3-Recruit-Without-Buildings/releases) available if you want to recruit units without buildings.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.10.9...v0.10.10

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.13r2
entry.content: - Rebalanced some traps (Encumbered, Butterfingers, Random Teleport) - Rewrote the entirety of fish DR (backwards compatible except for a handful of apworld bugs such as island west fish that cant be caught in summer). Should be more stable, more flexible, and a bit more compatible with LookupAnything (which still has bugs) - Fixed the first progressive house unlocking an upgrade on homeless - Implement an end to the noise traps

entry.title: Dead Cells v0.1.6
entry.content:
New Features: - Upgrade Death Link: - Death Link group, sending and receiving links only to people in the same group - Death Trap, giving a random trap when receiving a death link instead of dying (thanks chocobo13 for the idea) - Sub-option for Death Trap to trigger Trap Link - Energy Link, you can store and share your cells with other games, but you lose 20% of them upon deposit - Damage Link, the damage you take is sent to other games, and you can receive damage from them - Damage Link group, similar to other link groups - Health Link, life is shared between other Dead Cells players. Taking damage, healing, and recovery are based on percentage - Health Link group, similar to other link groups - Health Curse, sub-option that shares curses with others - Trap Link, when receiving a trap, send this trap to other Dead Cells players (thanks StudMuffin for the idea) - Trap Link group, similar to other link groups
Gameplay Changes: - Picking up a hunter's grenade while already having it now adds 5 charges - You can now buy hunter's grenade charges in the shop, 50 cells for active BSC+1 - The Legendary shop is finally open! For only 600 cells on colorless items
New Quality of Life: - Added error pop-up when disconnected in-game - Added a second menu page for the Energy Link UI - Already responsive and controller compatible, just like the first page
Bug Fixes: - Crash on menu when performing specific inputs with a controller - Death Link being sent when dying directly from Death Link - Item system not using the offline one upon disconnection, resulting in a crash and bugged location - Pokebomb charge being used when an enemy died while extracting - Could buy a colorless affix on a non-existent item with a controller - Double reverse controls trap, leaving the controls always inverted
Apworld Changes with the help of Rayze: - Fixed Sanguine Vortex missing a requirement of fully clearing a biome, which requires either Vine/Spider rune to reach the Toxic Sewers entrance, or either of the other two unlockable biomes - Fixed assault shield located in Toxic Sewers instead of Promenade
Compatible with apworld 0.1.4 and newer

entry.title: Dicey Dungeons v0.4.4b0
entry.content:
Changes from v0.4.3-beta: - Prevent information (importantly: goal completion) from bleeding between slots when connecting in same Client
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Fylcoast/AP_diceydungeons/compare/v0.4.3-beta...v0.4.4-beta

entry.title: Arkham Horror The Card Game v0.1.3
Stardew Valley v8.0.13r2r2
entry.content:
- Removed accidental dependency on VisibleFish - Fixed a null reference in the shop conditions - Added the waterfall to the DR fish spawns - Fixes to the Mineshaft fish - Attempted fix at festival cutscenes with non-existing actors
### 8.0.15-b and 8.0.15-c - More fixes to events and festivals

entry.title: The Farmer Was Replaced v0.0.7
entry.content:
For installation instructions, please [see the setup guide](https://github.com/seadoggie001/Archipelago/blob/theFarmerWasReplaced/worlds/tfwr/docs/setup_en.md)
## Fixes - Drones have been unfrozen! AP checks are submitted on a background thread, so the game can continue. - AP Disconnects are handled again - you can reconnect after being disconnected - The code captures and logs more exceptions now - A lot of background reshuffling making things easier to update in the future. (Exciting, right?!)

entry.title: Manual_TaylorSwiftDiscography_bennydreamly v5.0.1
entry.content:
this release fixes generation and the victory logic
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/benny-dreamly/Manuals/compare/TS-5.0.0...TS-5.0.1

entry.title: Mega Man Legends v0.3.0
entry.content:
## Very Important! **Duckstation MUST be running with the following non-default setting:** ``` Settings > Console > CPU Emulation > Execution Mode = Interpreter (Slowest) ``` This is because the client makes many runtime edits to the game's code. These will fail if Duckstation if running in Recompiler mode (default).
## New Features - Break linearity of the game's story with *region lock options*, each of which with Open, Randomized, and Vanilla options. If Randomized, corresponding items are shuffled into the pool with corresponding locations. If Open, the areas are automatically unlocked. - **Citizen's Card**: Controls access to the city. - **Class B License**: Controls access to the Underground Ruins. - **Class A License**: Controls access to the Sub-Gates. - **Unlock Main Gate**: ... - **Unlock Sub-Cities**: ... - A new "Defeat All Bosses" goal ("boss" = enemy with a health bar). - The option to shuffle your first special weapon (in place of the Splash Mine) across any desired subset of special weapons. If selected, the Splash Mine is shuffled into the item pool. - The option to shuffle Buster Max into the item pool. - The Cardon Forest Sub-Gate Keys are now proper items and locations. - Defeating Gai-nee Tooren in the Uptown Sub-city is now a location (and included in the "Defeat All Bosses" goal).
## Other Changes & Improvements - The client no longer requires running as administrator. Just make sure Duckstation is not running as admin either. - The client now loads your previous login host and slot for convenience from a log in the local directory. - The "Complete museum" location has been removed. The individual museum item turn-ins and the prism crystal are still a locations. - The Spring Set item is replaced with the Jump Springs. - The Mine Parts Kit item is replaced with the Splash Mine. - Many backend changes & improvements, e.g. the underlying client is upgraded to a more recent version.
## Bug Fixes - Some black screen bugs are handled (e.g. after Juno). - Fixed a bug where receiving a buster part could delete other buster parts. - Fixed issue where certain locations were getting released early with other locations. - Zenny will be re-received upon reloading a save such that you will not lose any zenny upon death. - Items that are already turned in or used in crafting will no longer be re-received after reloading a save. - Fixed issue where Anna side quest would always give Sun-light. Same for Ira quest which always gave Flower pearl.
## Caveats - This game is still in a pre-release state. Various bugs may persist which may render your seed incompletable. - If any bugs or crashes are encountered, please run "!debug" in the client and send me a screenshot of the result. - Since the v0.3.0 beta, most bugs have either fixed or assumed to be fixed. Let me know if you still encounter any of these beta bugs previously discussed!
Please read the Wiki page to learn more about various in-game logic requirement decisions that were made and implemented for this open world update: https://github.com/functorial/MMLAP/wiki/Open-World-Logic-and-Definitions
This update was very tricky to implement and would have been impossible without all the help from the community: - Uroogla for the code contributions, feedback, and constant stream of general helpfulness. - Alejandro for finding the memory address corresponding to game progression state, which serves as the basis of the open world update via multiple fast-forwarding methods. - TheCopperCat for enduring multiple nights of broken multiworld sessions with me. - The following people for bravely playtesting this version's broken beta and submitting bug reports: SavageWizzrobe, MacNCheese, Nitrocosmic, Colbydude, Ikari, deon, Zizzle, Slightly Angry Eevee, Raven Wolf, Maplelink64, Flitter, Patchwork, Megarexs, MainStun, All Meshed Up, SkyLinKo, Prin. - Everyone else unmentioned who offered feedback, suggestions, and encouragement.

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank 3 v0.6.0
entry.content:
## RaC3 APWorld v0.6.0 **Branch:** main **Date:** 2026-07-10 10:37 UTC
📜 Summary (1431 changes since v0.5.3) - RAC3: Fix JP MAIN_MENU/MAP_CHECK address conversion (9eb5f736d) - RAC3: Fix JP Florana vendor address range boundary (81482d9b7) - RAC3: Update JP version support status in FAQ (bf050f5ac) - RAC3: Update JP version status message to beta/completable (dd9aa4b59) - RAC3: Add initial support for JP version (280786c97) - RAC3: Standardize Shortcuts option keys (878a8f574) - Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/hacker-skip' into hacker-skip (f12175bf3) - RAC3: Small fixes to Holostar Teleporter, Vendor Access and Vendor Scouting (a9030439d) - RAC3: Improve message of development commands when used in normal builds (dd8c15e0d) - RAC3: Add option for items to be added to vendors when the infobot is collected (b997e8880) - RAC3: Holostar Teleporter Shortcut (f8c338095) - RAC3: Mark Post Hideout Assault as stable (003d22365) - RAC3: Add Find Qwark Location (d7b553625) - RAC3: Overhaul starting inventory handling (0f3672ca4) - RAC3: Add some Region debugging (e6ff27322) - RAC3: Allow all OptionCounter options to accept any value greater than 1 (6eaa505d7) - RAC3: Remove Suck it Up skillpoint from simple skillpoints (657fa0964) - RAC3: Allow any number input to enable scout vendors (7a7a32899) - RAC3: Add Gadgetron Debt Trap (ac300c7d4) - RAC3: Make /rac3_info for actions print out the IDs in hex (1b595aecb) - RAC3: Fix bolt pack offline fillers not working (d87af092d) - RAC3: Update UnitTest for Intro Skip default setting (7c7977742) - RAC3: Handle RYNO level cap command in weapon level tracking (d9bb600c6) - RAC3: Deprecate unused functions and constants (7a911067c) - RAC3: Parameter cleanup (4e2483292) - RAC3: Formatting (998716df7) - RAC3: Fix tyhrraguise puzzles on command center disappearing after refractor skip (0cbc099e7) - RAC3: Put Aridia mission 3 in logic if you have a long range weapon (94fc08ec7) - RAC3: Unlock sewers if homewarping from aquatos base + Fix broken rift inducer and qwack o ray level logic (c7716bf92) - RAC3: Remove shield charger levels if one hp challenge is enabled for ratchet (46217ccc6) - RAC3: Remove ammo from the vendor of weapons we dont have unlocked yet (893811555) - RAC3: Add 1ms to to jackpot timer if a new jackpot filler would perfectly overlap with an existing one (e4351eab2) - RAC3: Add stored fillers to server side save data (a969d7766) - RAC3: Grammar fixes in the yaml (e1dacb71b) - RAC3: Re-organize the NGPlusItems yaml description (c53229fa6) - RAC3: Fix formatting on region disabled message (141fde2ec) - RAC3: Update pypine (71e14832f) - RAC3: Make yaml more readable (b60fb5663) - RAC3: documentation change (548db952a) - RAC3: Add warning messages if people go to disabled regions (9f927744b) - RAC3: 4 bytes of storage per filler instead of 1 (62653af01) - RAC3: Fix addresses of stored fillers (6c1cd6e5a) - RAC3: Make PDA vendor scanning more reliable and add message to nation if you go there with it disabled (42398a8f5) - RAC3: Clarify shortcuts and speedups yaml (eceaa483c) - RAC3: Cap offline fillers at 255 (624183bbb) - RAC3: Update PyPINE (fd14f1055) - RAC3: Add last refractor door on command center to refractor skip (aa5c27ad1) - RAC3: Add more stuff to /rac3_info (9ba1cfbda) - RAC3: Prevent the use of locked weapons (a9140928a) - RAC3: Make newer yaml enabled/disabled options be consistent with the rest (55c63bebf) - RAC3: Fix latching jackpot fillers causing multiplier to stick at a too high value (7918c3021) - RAC3: Move helpdesk option to a new QoL section of the yaml (8d0276d94) - RAC3: Fix nanotech exp sometimes getting reset when processing offline nanotech fillers (330b075e0) - RAC3: Make main menu message reappear if you go back to main menu after game start (e38d0c738) - RAC3: Fix NG+ nanotech not respecting nanotech limitation (1a7ec4f90) - RAC3: rename skill master calc function (2ba0c4c55) - RAC3: Remember that the infernox skillpoint is a thing (0eada1c2c) - RAC3: make sure skill master trophy truely isn't in the pool if all 30 skill points arent either (ebcca0dc1) - RAC3: Fix omega weapons not showing up when progressive weapons are off (04d2f6d83) - RAC3: Improve notification for offline fillers (a33726589) - RAC3: Offline Fillers (39aee2381) - RAC3: Add missing function call to handle game ready (c21bd1eb3) - RAC3: Add helpdesk yaml option (3fbb65498) - RAC3: Force manual progressive weapons mode in more places if necessary (e3ea36936) - RAC3: Split progressive weapon leveling into manual and automatic (3d84aa783) - RAC3: Add weapon level locations to progressive weapons (fdd7716ff) - RAC3: Allow more permissive generation if in a big enough multiworld (433e2ea43) - RAC3: Fix no space between messages in handle not enough locations (47e0f49ca) - RAC3: Fix missing world.player in can reach region (e94d98713) - RAC3: Make good exp function setting independent (9cbd4c9e7) - RAC3: Fix fuzzing failures (eb6d4e8a1) - RAC3: Add special connection error message if you connect with the wrong Ratchet game. (7749419bc) - RAC3: Update NG+ items yaml description and add Weapon Level before weapon level locations (098f6896f) - RAC3: Make veldin skip the default (5d4641ad9) - RAC3: teeny tiny optimization to the cycle cache (bfd242f36) - RAC3: massively optimize nanotech and sewer crystal location reads (12e471f0a) - RAC3: Run Ruff Formatter (30dc0a279) - RAC3: Fix softlocked death link message for automatic softlocks (88066a875) - RAC3: Add failsafe for return to phoenix after grand prize bout (ecda44747) - RAC3: Mark VR Gadget training as stable (c8b768ae4) - RAC3: NG+ can always earn good xp (e51fb0713) - RAC3: Adjust good exp logic (29a4f631f) - RAC3: Add weapon levels are locations (1a0192062) - RAC3: Skip OptionError stuff if using UT is true (2be1efd65) - RAC3: Mark previous useful weapon as progression skip balancing (80aa60921) - RAC3: Also add weapon levels to weapon levels dict if progressive weapons are enabled (4fb488f6b) - RAC3: Fix omega arsenal getting checked on connect (589c5766e) - RAC3: Force omega arsenal trophy if all requirements are met (51118e33e) - RAC3: Move PAL shift minimum address up further to prevent vid comic ship teleport bugs (765b89d5a) - RAC3: Fix nanofinder trophy logic (adf028f59) - RAC3: Re-add missing level 100 nanotech... whoops (f3ed7c9b6) - RAC3: Adjust logic for weapon challenges in NG+ (5d1422292) - RAC3: Update NG+ nanotech logic once again (a30e4e664) - RAC3: temporarily comment out more WIP options to avoid confusion (c512698f8) - RAC3: Make NG+ Nanotech logic no longer distinguish between NG+ with or without multiplier (f6edfa02d) - RAC3: Re-adjust NG+ nanotech logic (b0a486634) - RAC3: Mark master plan and star map locations as stable (c429077c4) - RAC3: Add NG+ trophies (604ea30e2) - RAC3: Add up to 200 nanotech (6686e388b) - RAC3: Temporarily comment out the broken shortcuts/speedups and make all nanotech in logic if NGPlus is enabled regardless of multiplier (96f9bfc63) - RAC3: Allow jackpot crates if multiplier is x1 and increase jackpot filler to 30 second to match vanilla (b8643daf0) - RAC3: Add NGPlus Start yaml option (c47be3374) - Add support WSL2 + Windows environment (#146) (195dbbcc1) - RAC3: Only convert address once when reading bits (67200b740) - RAC3: Fix Tyhrranosis dropship not being there immediately (aa63c399a) - RAC3: Improve NGPlusItems yaml description (e32970626) - RAC3: Update PyPine (322dc9002) - RAC3: Delay weapon level ups if currently upgrading weapon pause state is active (518f89d3d) - RAC3: Add cutscene flags file (dd4b70ada) - RAC3: If main function hasn't been initialized yet, then we assume main menu (9869ea727) - RAC3: Fix weapon vendor yaml option overruling ngplus items yaml option (cba5106ec) - RAC3: Use newly discovered max health address for one hp challenge for vehicles (5453c041f) - RAC3: Add museum hacker doors to hacker skip because why not (4b4636d70) - RAC3: Allow the shield charger to be added to quick select (c02d3e446) - RAC3: Fix first tower tyhrranosis bug (7c572f9f2) - RAC3: Skip server save data no longer used (dd5b742b2) - RAC3: Make vendor overwrite only happen once (eacdec553) - RAC3: Fix markdown violations (acac0031a) - RAC3: Florana drawbridge fix (0b51d377a) - RAC3: Fix client disconnecting if connecting before game is ready (c4d76dac3) - RAC3: Improve planet switching (9f40f328b) - RAC3: cycle through all shortcut options (50bca2f93) - RAC3: Prevent server spam when after goaled (0d7efa924) - RAC3: RYNO command fixes (f26bc3aea) - RAC3: Vid Comic 4 is not PAL shifted (55752e101) - RAC3: Fix homewarp addresses for vid comics (1b13ad178) - RAC3: Optimize more reads (4e1610114) - RAC3: Reduce log file sizes for a ton (1478c1a06) - RAC3: Add moby address to assertion message (64cd14c8f) - RAC3: Fix PDA Vendor sometimes being outside the typical moby range (c0a71d562) - RAC3: Fix KeyError if weapon/armor vendor is disabled (f6e43d00a) - RAC3: Fix infinite items in the vendor (45771af4a) - RAC3: set between planets to False initially (5b316ead9) - RAC3: optimise some reads (4f6f77cd9) - RAC3: fix checking between planets (ce7364ee0) - RAC3: Gadget respawn on new planet timing improvements (9253b223f) - RAC3: Simplify Holostar Clank fix (36688788a) - RAC3: Aridia and Holostar fixes (1d0819c90) - RAC3: Fix warnings and formatting (64369e8c4) - RAC3: Remove unnecessary dict (b4145c81f) - RAC3: Small optimization for vendor cursor reads (c14d2a222) - RAC3: Weapon level up no longer gives free mega variant (268d9218e) - RAC3: Don't put omega weapons in the vendor if progressive weapons (b054fa715) - RAC3: Fix xp getting reset back to level thredshold (f5b8a32d4) - RAC3: Fix weapon level restoration (2a6b26331) - RAC3: Add NGPlus weapons to the vendor if you have the V5 version (fe88fc906) - RAC3: Rename NG+ option names (22a83329d) - RAC3: /RYNO command supports any level value (4c4f3309c) - RAC3: Add NG+ Item and Vendor Options (9b105b41e) - RAC3: Prevent VR weapon test from collecting location (583dac28b) - RAC3: Fix TypeError (001379d29) - RAC3: Refactor moby scanning to use Ratchet pointer instead of moby table constants (0e7f331c5) - RAC3: Server Side Savedata (7d14c268b) - RAC3: Some Mission Bugfixes (da9cbe169) - RAC3: New Planet Handling (69d108135) - RAC3: Fix small bugs (5e2d1deb7) - RAC3: Fix various type and attribute errors (c8c9aa9ec) - RAC3: Add missing NGPlus location group (de120d7e4) - RAC3: Handle Tyhrranosis Dropship (8bc466dae) - RAC3: take intro skip into account for nanotech logic (a214d0356) - RAC3: Make dynamic nanotech logic (a2bffe07e) - RAC3: Post Vendor Balance Changes (0738f2c7b) - RAC3: Documentation (6aa85b84b) - RAC3: Shortcut Data Refactor (569174373) - RAC3: Add metropolis taxi shortcut (937271a91) - RAC3: Fix hacker skip on aquatos (91d9909d5) - RAC3: Add more shortcuts (e2c565895) - RAC3: correctly clear visited planets (abeb059fa) - RAC3: Run Ruff Formatter (f6a5fd731) - RAC3: Tiny optimizations (c109d63b6) - RAC3: Optimize get visited planets (de91b308d) - RAC3: Add read/write count to update cycle debug log (253e5b3f6) - RAC3: Remove redundant sequence break about sasha (84dbd9c16) - RAC3: Fixed progress flags with multiple bits not getting set correctly (58c7b3b74) - RAC3: Fix gadget skips (cc47f1e1d) - RAC3: Fix write bits (3f0255b87) - RAC3: Fix errors (f95da2171) - RAC3: Add more Shortcuts (c420b69a8) - RAC3: Fix introskip (4112c14ba) - RAC3: Fix relative import that should have been absolute (9688b21a0) - RAC3: Split Progress and Moby flags (ecd70908d) - RAC3: Split Shortcuts and Speedups (d29568a02) - RAC3: Make reloading mark off the boolean that indicate that the refractor puzzles have been unlocked (4ce85725f) - RAC3: Remember to call the new cycler (0af2edcbb) - RAC3: Add more shortcut constants (382126a84) - RAC3: Begin refractor skip (6d721929c) - RAC3: Add Tyhrraguise skip (2ae6b1a32) - RAC3: Fix phoenix hacker skip (6615c4db8) - RAC3: Remove accents from messages (e793aab37) - RAC3: Fix Code cave getting set up before it is ready (28882ca21) - RAC3: Fix some characters not getting replaced with a question mark (b8996f02d) - RAC3: Fix small oversight (ce0092ea9) - RAC3: Code cleanup 3 (The Big One) (b2cbd1bca) - RAC3: Raise character limit in message boxes to 250 bytes (07a7e00b7) - RAC3: Allow homewarping in vid comics (b9814b244) - RAC3: Add load level dev command (b4f5e5a9a) - RAC3: Code cleanup 2 (Constants) (2de39b827) - RAC3: let people use development commands again, but everyone will know about it (c2ae2fbb0) - RAC3: Remove redundant connection check (fb27dc7ee) - RAC3: Minor puzzle check refactor (8828fd3c4) - RAC3: Code cleanup 1 (Client) (d2e1264f5) - RAC3: Make existing development command only available if on a development build (b69f9df3f) - RAC3: Fix Galaxy Burger (0dbf0565a) - RAC3: Update hacker skip yaml option description (4f4d30fb5) - RAC3: Remove start address debug logging and made it easier for traversal test command to use the table addresses automatically (4a3f33cde) - RAC3: Add holostar to PAL, whoops (67fffba03) - RAC3: Make reloading stop the moby searching (b452917d9) - RAC3: Add PAL addresses for hacker puzzle (85a730b6f) - RAC3: Fix aquatos gate not unlocking (ec4e1d9df) - RAC3: Write the number 5 for all objects (cf76cc26b) - RAC3: Changing planets counts as a reload (75c91dd65) - RAC3: Force the doors/elevators to open (928430565) - RAC3: Add client logging message too (056138e73) - RAC3: Make the hacker skip warning run only once per seed at most (0874f46fc) - RAC3: Change the bit for command center hacker puzzle (230096766) - RAC3: Remove messagebox debug logging (05345b114) - RAC3: Add hacker skip to proc options (7640d0752) - RAC3: Fix scout vender constant missing (ad6dddd3e) - RAC3: Make sure that hacker cycler actually gets called (e492b9ad4) - RAC3: Add warning if hacker is received on a planet with hacker skip enabled. (9fb6fc807) - RAC3: Add Progressflag class (7c7aee613) - RAC3: Add Hacker Skip yaml option (064269fbe) - RAC3: Add health cycler TODO (7aea4170b) - RAC3: Add message length validation to enqueue notification (80379d12f)\n- ...and 1231 more commits.
**Full changelog and compare**: https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/compare/v0.5.3...v0.6.0 ### [Setup Guide](https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/blob/staging/worlds/rac3/docs/setup_en.md) ### Notes This release was automatically generated from the **main** branch. Latest (main) releases are recommended, as pre-releases (staging) may contain experimental or in-progress changes. ### If a location is broken and does not get sent out Go to the server console (locally or via the Archipelago room page) and run: `/send_location ` Example: `/send_location TaoshiRaC3 "Crash Site: Infobot: Aridia"`

entry.title: YOHANE THE PARHELION -BLAZE in the DEEPBLUE- v0.2.1
entry.content:
# v0.2.1 Craftsanity hotfix **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SilicDev/Archipelago/compare/yohane_bitdb-v0.2.0...yohane_bitdb-v0.2.1
# Bug fixes - Fixed an error where craftsanity wouldn't actually add any locations
# Internal - More tests

entry.title: The Binding of Isaac Repentance v0.4.1r2
entry.content: Mostly irrelevant determinism fix

entry.title: Flowersanity v1.1.0
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Removed ~500 potentially inappropriate colors - Fixed some options not having a description - Fixed world description on webhost having leftover text from copy&paste
### Compatibility No backwards compatibility

entry.title: The Grinch v1.6.0r2r2r2
entry.content:
## Notice This version is a beta. Meaning, this is meant to test the new features and it's behavior. Do not submit to public syncs and asyncs unless you want to take the risk of any issues that may occur when playing it. Play it at your own risk! I am not responsible for any issues that may occur if you decide to bring this version to public sessions.
### Changes - A sleigh part option joins the game today, mixing multiworld paths or old vanilla play! - Mission item randomizing joins the show, in familiar spots or shuffled flow! - With clever new logic, you'll roam with delight where average players lose the fight! - No more crates get squashed on Mount Crumpit’s steep height, now every one can be collected with ease and delight!
### Bugfixes - And logic bugs were swatted out, so neat, like tiny flies removed before repeat!

entry.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.4.1
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Use __package__ instead of __name__ to fetch resources to make it work on older python versions by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/63 * Make progressive item collection more defensive by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/64
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.4.0...platformer-0.4.1

entry.title: Blue Fire v0.1.0r2r2
entry.content:
[NEW] Added 10 locations for the mana upgrades at the fire shrines [NEW] Added deathlink support. Can both receive a deathlink message to kill the player and send a deathlink message upon death
[FIX] Game does not crash anymore upon closing it in the menu

entry.title: Manual_TaylorSwiftDiscography_bennydreamly v6.0.1
entry.content:
This release fixes the victory logic, which didn't include the newly added life of a showgirl album.
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/benny-dreamly/Manuals/compare/TS-6.0.0...TS-6.0.1

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.13r2r2r2
entry.content: - Fixed Robin still offering a house upgrade you can't accept - Fixed Desert Festival ER warps being all messed up - Keep the extended family special order related conditions on both sets of legendary fish with DR - Fixed the beach shortcuts ER getting confused for each other - Fixed the makeover trap sometimes giving illegal hairstyles - Fixed the Benjamin Budton trap sometimes hitting a forageable on the ground

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.7.2
entry.content:
Adds apollo style missions and multi-launch assembly into logic
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.7.1...v0.7.2

entry.title: Crystal Project v0.17.0

author.name: Dragons but also Rabbits, FabulaFey, Emerassi

entry.content:
### **Crystal Project v.0.17.0** <https://github.com/Emerassi/CrystalProjectAPWorld/releases>
### 🚨 AP World Update 🚨
New YAML Option Heist regionsanity. Similar to extreme regionsanity where the player will only be able to spend a few seconds in a zone they do not have a pass for, except in this mode the timer is shorter but the player can interact with all the checks to steal them out from under the grandmaster's nose. Additionally new items are added to the pool that extend the regionsanity teleport timer
New YAML Option Skip Intro Crawl. When enabled the intro crawl will no display
Castle Ramparts rework. Castle Ramparts should now play better with home point hustle giving access to the region with a small number of mounts.
### 🚨 Bug Fixes 🚨 Fixed an issue with the old world showing in logic when it shouldnt with regionsanity enabled and the true astely goal. Fixed an issue with save files being unable to be loaded Fixed an issue where the game would crash upon opening the map under certain circumstances
### KNOWN ISSUES - Receiving a passive point cap increase does not update the available passive points until a passive is toggled on or off. - Mods that change the text scrolls (such as the intro in spawning meadows) may result in unexpected behaviour

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.7.3
entry.content:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.7.2...v0.7.3
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.7.2...v0.7.3

entry.title: Phoenotopia: Awakening v0.3.0r2r2r2
entry.content:
Bugfix - 0.3.3

Minor release to fix a bug and adjust some logic.

Changes

- Fixed bug where the game would crash when entering the shooting gallery when a progressive item can be found there. Shoutout to WWolla for reporting the issue. - Atai dark tower now logically requires a light source. Full patch notes of 0.3 can be found [here](https://github.com/Amphyros/Phoenotopia-Awakening-AP-client/releases/tag/v0.3.0).

entry.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.4.2
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Fix item name for progressive items created by create_item by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/65 * Fix wrongly named variable by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/66
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.4.1...platformer-0.4.2

entry.title: PokePark v1.2.4
entry.content:
## What's Changed * 128 bug drifloon region bug by @Mekurushi in https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/pull/129 * 131 bug added lapras in the attraction checks by @Mekurushi in https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/pull/131 * 130 bug haunter not part of the rotom attraction rules by @Mekurushi in https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/pull/132 * 125 bug password item are not necessary for attraction legendary pokemon friendship by @Mekurushi in https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/pull/133
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Mekurushi/Archipelago_Pokepark/compare/1.2.3...1.2.4

entry.title: The Binding of Isaac Repentance v0.4.3.post2
entry.content: This isn't marked as a full release yet because I have rewritten the entire internal logic, therefore I'm not 100% sure there aren't any logic bugs now. But like 95% sure from all the testing I did myself. It also now integrates Universal Tracker into the Client *if* you have the UT apworld installed, as in, you can use all the fancy UT commands directly in the Isaac Client now, such as /explain to understand why things are in logic or what's still required to be able to access those locations.

entry.title: The Grinch v1.6.0r2r2r2r2
entry.content:
## Notice This version is a beta. Meaning, this is meant to test the new features and it's behavior. Do not submit to public syncs and asyncs unless you want to take the risk of any issues that may occur when playing it. Play it at your own risk! I am not responsible for any issues that may occur if you decide to bring this version to public sessions.
### Changes - A sleigh part option joins the game today, mixing multiworld paths or old vanilla play! - Mission item randomizing joins the show, in familiar spots or shuffled flow! - With clever new logic, you'll roam with delight where average players lose the fight! - No more crates get squashed on Mount Crumpit’s steep height, now every one can be collected with ease and delight!
### Bugfixes - And logic bugs were swatted out, so neat, like tiny flies removed before repeat!

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.13r2r2r2r2
entry.content: - When events are waiting for an actor to move, and that actor doesn't exist, skip to the next step instead of waiting forever - Added a mod-side safeguard (for the beta playtest) for island fish to be catchable in summer and submarine fish in winter - Made crab pot fish count for special orders (ex: island fish) - Made crab pot rainbow trouts able to drop golden tags during the trout derby - Made crab pot fish, caught with a rod during an event (ice festival, fair), have a size so the game gives them a score (need testing for this, wasn't provided a save file) - Fixed the locked door warps patch that I apparently had accidentally disabled

entry.title: YARG v0.0.23
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for the YARN Pack 5 Setlist
## What's Changed * Added YARN Pack 5 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/52
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.22...0.0.23

entry.title: Garfield Kart - Furious Racing v1.0.0
entry.content:
*The final major release!*
`New:` - [APWorld/Client] Added checks for completing races/cups on 150cc/100cc/50cc. These get added based on your cc requirement setting in the yaml, and send out based on the highest cc completed - [APWorld/Client] Added 3 new fillers: Random Item Box, Start Boost Helper, Inspirational Garfield Quote - [APWorld/Client] Added 5 new traps: Mirror Trap, Sleep Trap, Grayscale Trap, Broken Drift Trap, Bounce Trap - [APWorld/Client] De-coupled the Time Trial locations from the time trial goal, allowing you to randomize time trials without setting time trials as your goal. Time Trials now unlock upon unlocking access to a specific race/cup - [APWorld] Allowed you to set a required % of Puzzle Pieces to goal a Puzzle Piece Hunt slot - [APWorld] Added new options for handling traps and how long they should be active for - [Client] Added DeathLink support - [Client] Added new art for the main menu logo and puzzle piece icons, courtesy of Flow - [Client] Added mod config options for lapsanity placement requirement, CPU item handling with itemsanity, and toggling on/off item mania mode - [Client] Added extra text displays of the status of each race/cup/time trials checks in the relevant selection menus, as well as lapsanity. - [Client] Revamped the Gallery menu to be used as a tracker for various items you've been sent, as well as a counter for how much puzzle pieces you've gotten. It's now labeled as "Archipelago" with the Archipelago logo. - [Client] Added extra text on the character selections to display if you've sent checks for winning with them or not
`Changes:` - [APWorld/Client] Removed the ability to split up hats/spoilers by tiers or progressively. These are now just randomize on or off, automatically giving you the highest tier hat/spoiler - [APWorld] Simplified item names across the whole APWorld - [Client] Changed the cc_requirement handling to allow you to play a higher cc than you set (for example, playing 150cc with 100cc requirement set) and still make checks count - [Client] Changed item randomization to give you a 50% chance to select an item you've been given, instead of giving you nothing, if you haven't received every item yet. - [Client] Changed lapsanity to require you to play on your set cc_requirement or higher for it to count. - [Client] Goal tracking is now handled via a json file storing data, rather than by checking what locations you have sent. This fixes collect causing issues with auto goaling slots, as you will now have to goal all races manually - [Client] Changed the top screen notification display to display colors, and have a drop shadow to be seen easier - [Client] Filtered out warning about compressed websockets and !help message from the notification display
`Fixes:` - [Client] Fixed a bug where the Bombastic Spoiler item gave you the Apprentice Hat - [Client] Fixed the item roulette animation not happening if you picked up and item box and got an item you haven't unlocked - [Client] Fixed bug where you could select characters/karts you don't have unlocked via the Garage menu. - [Client] Fixed the top screen notification display not scaling properly for resolutions

entry.title: Kerbal Space Program 1 v0.8.0
entry.content: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/nickdavies/Archipelago/compare/v0.7.3...v0.8.0

entry.title: Final Fantasy XIV v0.30.0
entry.content: * Added new checks for attuning aetherytes. * Added new option: Huntsanity. Checks for defeating hunt targets. * Added the rest of Bozja. * Added Occult Crescent South Horn. * Added new PvP map * Changed logic for Big Fish to also require the bait for Intuition fish * More kinds of filler items. * Option to exclude specific jobs from the item pool. * Assorted bugfixes

entry.title: Flowersanity v1.1.0r2
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Removed ~500 potentially inappropriate colors - Fixed some options not having a description - Fixed world description on webhost having leftover text from copy&paste
### Compatibility No backwards compatibility

entry.title: Library of Ruina v1.0.0r2
entry.content:
As always, check known bugs and report bugs in #70
**Unsubscribe from workshop mod!**
**NEW RUN REQUIRED**
**Uses -epsilon .apworld** ## What changed since -alpha: <details> <summary>In older versions</summary>
### In -beta: - FIXED: Custom books are now properly saved - FIXED: Now you can't put books into the invitation manually, and can't find receptions earlier that way - FIXED: Impossible Passive Attribution Points (Needs testing, but i'm 99% sure it's fixed now) - FIXED: Receptions are no longer visible after joining new session without closing the game - FIXED: It's not possible to open Black Silence and Distorted Ensemble before you reach those battles ### In -gamma: - CHANGED: Updated reception tree looks in the game. the reception box of doom. It's only for testing, so bear with me. - CHANGED & FIXED: Changed how run seeds work. Fixed stuff related to them (also thanks Yar) ### In -delta: - ADDED: Modified passive attribution system. Can now attribute up to 16 books. Passive Limits Break Item now works - FIXED: Impossible keypages and pages don't drop now (i hope) ### In -epsilon: - CHANGED: Updated reception tree looks in the game. It's a pretty simple Sugiyama's algorithm with minimized edge-crossing for now. Hopefully i can figure out something fancier later. Also cool placement for endgoals - CHANGED: The checkmark for completed stages been changed to be a "status" of the stage: Checkmark is shown when the reception is cleared (completed + all checks collected); An exclamation mark is shown when the reception can be cleared (player has right books to start the stage) - CHANGED: Suppressions/Realization are now accessed on the map the say way Receptions are. - CHANGED: Playing with "Enemies Turn Into Checks" Option now sends remaining checks on stage clear (main purpose of that option was always to allow to chip at the enemy and get more checks to potentially escape BK situation, and not fight Xiao 8 times) - CHANGED: Items should now get received faster when in bulk (PLEASE REPORT ANY CRASHES!) - CHANGED: Custom icons are now also used for BoE (not yet available tee hee), Booster Packs and library progress level - ADDED: Floor Stages (Abnos/Realizations) now have a roman number specifying the order of the stage - ADDED: Shuffle Reverb Ensemble Floors option - ADDED: Endgoals always unlocked option - FIXED: Binah librarian shortage \[By Yar] - FIXED: Divide by 0 error \[By Yar] - FIXED: Keter Realization now works properly (Snow queen part & snow queen suppression are not fixed yet, also when binah is replaced by angela, angela will be locked if player doesn't have Binah item, not sure if i have to fix that) - FIXED: Item hints position on differently sized screens (SOMEONE PLEASE TEST AND TELL ME IF IT WORKS!) - FIXED: Leave stage button in the team setup window before the fight now works all the time - FIXED: Binah (and librarians with base keypages) can now get passives attributed - REMOVED: The chapter shortcut buttons for the map & chapter filter for book burning screen have been removed - REMOVED: The option to NOT randomize the reception tree is DISCONTINUED!
</details>
### In -zeta: - ADDED: Emotion Limit Break item is now functional. - CHANGED: Emotion levels now work a bit differently to make sense of the Emotion Limit Break item: - Battle Units (Enemies/librarians) now have a higher technical cap of emotion levels (30 levels) - The actual cap for librarians is decided by the total count of Emotion Limit Break Items the player has - The actual cap for enemies is decided by the vanilla chapter of the reception (so 1 for Rats & 7 for Oliver and Ensemble) - Instead of getting abno pages of only a certain level on team emotion level up, player can get any abno page with level less or equal to team emotion level (so you get access to level 3 pages at emotion level 3 instead of 5, and can get level 3 pages at any point after level 3 too) - ^ That DOES mean that you can get all 15 abno pages in a single battle - You get an EGO page at every level starting with 3rd (meaning you'll have every EGO page the floor has at level 7) - The amount of emotion coins needed to level up is adjusted for levels past 5 with 13 being the cap for levels 15+ (technical limitation that i COULD remove but don't want to) - The amount of light gotten for emotion is adjusted: - You get 1 light for every levels 1-5 - You get 1 light for every second level for levels 5-15 (so at levels 7, 9, 11, 13, 15) - You get 1 light for every third level for levels 15-30 (so at levels 18, 21, 24, 27, 30) - You get a speed die every 4th level (so at levels 4, 8, 12, etc.) - UI is changed a bit so the game doesn't break at levels past 5 and when a unit has more than 5 abno pages (Yes, you CAN stack up to 15 abno pages on a single unit now. Go nuts.) - Also, when receiving the emotion limit break item mid-battle, the max emotion level will be updated! - CHANGED: Connect window now has more exception handling messages with additional info on where the exception occured (so i can figure out the issue faster)
